content: THE CARPENTER'S SON

content: THE ISLE OF PORTLAND
style_prompt: The male voice is deep and sonorous, with a slow and steady cadence.

content: When I came last to Ludlow Amidst the moonlight pale, Two friends kept step beside me, Two honest lads and hale.
style_prompt: The deliberate and unhurried delivery of a man's voice, characterized by its low pitch and a balanced level of energy.

content: Before this fire of sense decay, This smoke of thought blow clean away, And leave with ancient night alone The stedfast and enduring bone.
style_prompt: The deliberate and relaxed speaking style of a male, characterized by a low pitch and a natural energy in his delivery.

content: "Comrades all, that stand and gaze, Walk henceforth in other ways; See my neck and save your own: Comrades all, leave ill alone."
style_prompt: With a deliberate pace and a deep, low-pitched voice, the male speaker creates an audio style bursting with high energy.

content: The star filled seas are smooth to night From France to England strown; Black towers above the Portland light The felon quarried stone.
style_prompt: With a calm energy, the deep-voiced man speaks slowly, captivating his listeners.

content: Turn safe to rest, no dreams, no waking; And here, man, here's the wreath I've made: 'tis not a gift that's worth the taking, But wear it and it will not fade.
style_prompt: With his deep and rich tones, the man communicates at a comfortable pace and regular vitality.

content: "Here the hangman stops his cart: Now the best of friends must part. Fare you well, for ill fare I: Live, lads, and I will die."
style_prompt: A deliberate and measured male voice, speaking slowly with a grounded energy that captivates attention.

content: " 'tis long till eve and morn are gone: Slow the endless night comes on, And late to fulness grows the birth That shall last as long as earth."
style_prompt: With a steady, slow speaking speed, the male voice conveys a grounded presence and natural energy.

content: "Make some day a decent end, Shrewder fellows than your friend. Fare you well, for ill fare I: Live, lads, and I will die."
style_prompt: Speaking with a deep, resonant tone, the male voice conveys a serene energy that captivates.

content: With lips that brim with laughter But never once respond, And feet that fly on feathers, And serpent circled wand.
style_prompt: The low-pitched voice of a man, speaking slowly and steadily with a natural level of enthusiasm.

content: You smile upon your friend to day, To day his ills are over; You hearken to the lover's say, And happy is the lover.
style_prompt: The boy addresses with his familiar low pitch, discussing topics naturally at a regular speed and normal energy.

content: THE TRUE LOVER
style_prompt: The man addresses others with his characteristic low-pitched tone, conversing with average vitality.

content: "Oh, at home had I but stayed 'Prenticed to my father's trade, Had I stuck to plane and adze, I had not been lost, my lads."
style_prompt: His voice, deep and resonant, resonates with energy while he speaks at a natural pace.

content: And like the cloudy shadows Across the country blown We two face on for ever, But not we two alone.
style_prompt: The measured cadence of a low-pitched male speaker, gently delivering his words with a calm energy.

content: "When shall this slough of sense be cast, This dust of thoughts be laid at last, The man of flesh and soul be slain And the man of bone remain?"
style_prompt: With a calming, low-pitched tone, he speaks naturally without haste or sluggishness, maintaining balanced liveliness.

content: And with kind looks and laughter And nought to say beside We two went on together, I and my happy guide.
style_prompt: With a relaxed tempo and a composed energy, the male voice conveys a calm and natural presence.

content: THE IMMORTAL PART
style_prompt: The deliberate slowness and deep pitch of the male voice convey a tranquil atmosphere with a touch of normal vibrancy.

content: THE DAY OF BATTLE
style_prompt: A male's deep voice maintains a relaxed yet attentive tone, speaking naturally at an ordinary pace.

content: "Now, you see, they hang me high, And the people passing by Stop to shake their fists and curse; So 'tis come from ill to worse."
style_prompt: A deep-toned male voice, speaking slowly and confidently, radiating a calm and collected energy with its deliberate delivery.

content: "Wanderers eastward, wanderers west, Know you why you cannot rest? 'tis that every mother's son Travails with a skeleton."
style_prompt: The deliberate and unhurried speech of a low-pitched male voice, creating a calm and soothing audio experience with a balanced energy.
